data.name: Emilia
data.about:
Meet Emilia, the visionary force behind the company. A graduate of the University of Buffalo with a master's in theatre arts, Emilia brings an unusually human-centered lens to entrepreneurship — one shaped by her rich background as a researcher, writer, and creative thinker.

As Founder, Emilia sets the strategic direction of the company with a people-first philosophy at its core. She built this organization on the belief that an institution is only as strong as the relationships within it — and that lasting success starts with culture, trust, and purpose. Her collaborative leadership style, honed through partnerships with organizations like IDEO and Pentagram, means she leads with listening first.

Emilia champions a workplace where people feel genuinely seen, supported, and empowered to do their best work. Whether she's shaping long-term strategy, rallying the team around a shared vision, or rolling up her sleeves on the details, she brings the same warmth, intention, and intellectual rigour to everything she does.

Outside the office, Emilia reads widely, writes often, plays basketball, and champions the kind of interdisciplinary thinking that makes both people and organizations more resilient. She continues to shape the company's future one bold, human decision at a time.

data.name: Danny
data.about:
Danny is the company's Coach — the person people turn to when they need clarity, direction, and a reminder of what they're capable of. Born and raised in Los Angeles and now based in San Francisco, Danny brings a rare combination of technical depth and genuine people-first leadership to his role.

With a background in computer science and years of experience navigating high-growth environments, Danny has a gift for meeting people where they are and helping them grow beyond where they thought they could go. His coaching style is grounded in empathy, honest feedback, and an unshakeable belief in human potential.

Whether he's working one-on-one with team members, facilitating growth conversations, or helping the organization build better habits and systems, Danny approaches every engagement with warmth, patience, and infectious enthusiasm.

Outside of work, he's a lifelong learner — equally at home on a spontaneous road trip as he is deep in a new book or experimenting with a side project. His fearless spirit and open mind make him not just a great coach, but a great person to have in your corner.

data.name: Angela
data.about:
Angela is the company's Project Analyst — the engine behind organized execution and data-informed decision making. Originally from London and now a seasoned freelance professional, Angela brings a sharp eye for detail and a talent for transforming complex information into clear, actionable insights.

With a background in copywriting and a deep love for structured thinking, Angela bridges the gap between creative vision and operational clarity. She tracks project progress, identifies risks early, and ensures that every initiative moves forward with precision and purpose.

Angela thrives in collaborative environments, working closely with cross-functional teams to keep deliverables on track and stakeholders well-informed. Her ability to blend qualitative storytelling with quantitative rigour makes her an invaluable analytical voice in any project room.

When she steps away from dashboards and timelines, Angela recharges through travel, long walks in nature, and a good book paired with a cup of tea. Her zest for life and commitment to doing things right — not just fast — define both her work and her character.

data.name: Isabella
data.about:
Isabella leads Human Resources with a visionary, people-first approach — shaped by her background in graphic design and a deep flair for storytelling. Raised in West Batavia, New York, Isabella brings both creative instinct and sharp business acumen to the work of building and sustaining a great team.

In her HR role, Isabella champions hiring practices rooted in both skill and cultural alignment, designs onboarding experiences that make people feel genuinely welcomed, and creates the conditions for employees to grow and thrive. She believes that an organization is only as strong as the relationships within it — and she works every day to make those relationships stronger.

Her human-centered approach, informed by travel, nature, and the richness of diverse cultures, means she leads with empathy and an eye for both the big picture and the finer details.

Outside the office, Isabella draws inspiration from exploring the world, staying attuned to creative trends, and building the kind of culture where people and ideas can truly flourish.
